# DLS — Icon System

> All icons are 24×24px, `fill="black"` by default, and use `viewBox="0 0 24 24"`.
> Tint icons using `fill` or CSS `color` (with `fill="currentColor"`) as needed.
> More icons will be added in subsequent batches.

---

## Icon Specs

| Property   | Value              |
|------------|--------------------|
| Size       | 24 × 24 px         |
| ViewBox    | 0 0 24 24          |
| Fill       | Black (`#000000`)  |
| Format     | SVG                |

---

## Icon Library

### Batch 1 — Archive & Arrows

| Icon Name           | File                    | Description                                      |
|---------------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| Archive             | `Archive.svg`           | Box with lid — archive/store action              |
| Arrow Back          | `Arrow-Back.svg`        | Long arrow pointing left — go back               |
| Arrow Forward       | `Arrow-Forward.svg`     | Long arrow pointing right — go forward           |
| Arrow Up            | `Arrow-Up.svg`          | Long arrow pointing up — with arrowhead style    |
| Arrow Down          | `Arrow-Down.svg`        | Long arrow pointing down — with arrowhead style  |
| Arrow Up 1          | `Arrow-Up-1.svg`        | Chevron-style arrow pointing up                  |
| Arrow Down 1        | `Arrow-Down-1.svg`      | Chevron-style arrow pointing down                |
| Arrow Up 2          | `Arrow-Up_2.svg`        | Double chevron pointing up                       |
| Arrow Down 2        | `Arrow-Down_2.svg`      | Double chevron pointing down                     |
| Arrow Left          | `Arrow-Left.svg`        | Chevron-style arrow pointing left                |
| Arrow Right         | `Arrow-Right.svg`       | Chevron-style arrow pointing right               |
| Arrow Left 2        | `Arrow-Left_2.svg`      | Double chevron pointing left                     |
| Arrow Right 2       | `Arrow-Right_2.svg`     | Double chevron pointing right                    |
| Arrow Dropdown      | `Arrow-Dropdown.svg`    | Filled triangle pointing down — for dropdowns    |
| Arrow Filled Left   | `Arrow-Filled_Left.svg` | Solid filled arrow pointing left                 |
| Arrow Filled Right  | `Arrow-Filled_Right.svg`| Solid filled arrow pointing right                |

---

## Batch 2 — UI & Utility Icons

| Icon Name                        | File                              | Description                                             |
|----------------------------------|-----------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------|
| Backspace                        | `Backspace.svg`                   | Backspace / delete key — keyboard input                 |
| Calendar                         | `Calendar.svg`                    | Calendar / date picker                                  |
| Close Circle Outline             | `Close-Circle_Outline.svg`        | X inside a circle — outlined style                     |
| Close Circle Solid               | `Close-Circle_Solid.svg`          | X inside a filled circle — solid style                 |
| Close (Only)                     | `Close-Close_Only.svg`            | Bare X mark — dismiss / close                          |
| Error Circle Solid               | `Error-Circle_Solid.svg`          | ! inside a filled circle — error state                 |
| Error Hexagon Outline            | `Error-Hexagon_Outline.svg`       | ! inside a hexagon — outlined error/warning             |
| Error Speech Bubble Solid        | `Error-Speech_Bubble_Solid.svg`   | ! inside a filled speech bubble — inline error          |
| Flip                             | `Flip.svg`                        | Circular arrows — flip / refresh / rotate              |
| Gamepad                          | `Gamepad.svg`                     | Game controller — gaming / interactive content         |
| Hash                             | `Hash.svg`                        | # symbol — tags, channels, number references           |
| Heart Outline                    | `Heart_Outline.svg`               | Heart — outlined / unfavourited state                  |
| Heart Solid                      | `Heart_Solid.svg`                 | Heart — filled / favourited state                      |
| Help                             | `Help.svg`                        | ? inside a circle — help / support                     |
| History                          | `History.svg`                     | Clock with counter-clockwise arrow — history / undo    |
| Home Outline                     | `Home-Outline.svg`                | House — outlined / inactive nav state                  |
| Home Solid                       | `Home-Solid.svg`                  | House — filled / active nav state                      |
| Information Circle Outline       | `Information-Circle_Outline.svg`  | i inside a circle — outlined info                      |
| Information Circle Solid         | `Information-Circle_Solid.svg`    | i inside a filled circle — solid info                  |
| Information Speech Bubble Solid  | `Information-Speech_Bubble_Solid.svg` | i inside a filled speech bubble — contextual info  |

---

## Batch 3 — Actions, Navigation & Selection Icons

| Icon Name                    | File                              | Description                                                   |
|------------------------------|-----------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| Like Thumb Solid             | `Like-Thumb_Solid.svg`            | Thumbs up — filled/active liked state                        |
| Like Thumb Up Outline        | `Like-Thumb_Up_Outline.svg`       | Thumbs up — outlined/inactive state                          |
| Loader                       | `Loader.svg`                      | Circular arc — loading / spinner indicator                   |
| Lock                         | `Lock.svg`                        | Padlock — locked / secure state                              |
| More Horizontal Menu         | `More-Horizontal_Menu.svg`        | Three horizontal dots — overflow / more actions              |
| More Vertical Menu           | `More-Vartical_Menu.svg`          | Three vertical dots — overflow / more actions                |
| Next                         | `Next.svg`                        | Double chevron inside circle — next / skip forward           |
| Notification Bell Outline    | `Notification-Bell_Outline.svg`   | Bell — outlined notification icon                            |
| Reset                        | `Reset.svg`                       | Counter-clockwise arrow — reset / undo to default            |
| Retry                        | `Retry.svg`                       | Clockwise circular arrow — retry / refresh                   |
| Rewards                      | `Rewards.svg`                     | Gift/present box — rewards / loyalty                         |
| Screen Rotation              | `Screen_Rotation.svg`             | Rotating device — screen rotation / orientation              |
| Search                       | `Search_1.svg`                    | Magnifying glass — search                                    |
| Selection Only Right Tick    | `Selection-Only_Right_Tick.svg`   | Bare checkmark — selected / confirmed (no container)         |
| Selection Right Tick Outline | `Selection-Right_Tick_Outline.svg`| Checkmark inside outlined circle — selected state            |
| Selection Right Tick Solid   | `Selection-Right_Tick_Solid.svg`  | Checkmark inside filled circle — selected/confirmed state    |
| Selection Unselected         | `Selection-Unselected.svg`        | Empty circle — unselected / radio button default             |
| Settings                     | `Settings.svg`                    | Gear / cog — settings / configuration                        |

---

## Batch 4 — Share, Media, View, Watch & Misc (Final)

| Icon Name               | File                          | Description                                               |
|-------------------------|-------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| Share Outline           | `Share-Share_Outline.svg`     | Three-node share graph — outlined style                  |
| Share Solid             | `Share-Share_Solid.svg`       | Three-node share graph — solid/filled style              |
| Share WhatsApp          | `Share-WhatsApp.svg`          | WhatsApp logo inside speech bubble — share via WhatsApp  |
| Verified                | `Verified.svg`                | Badge with checkmark — verified / trusted status         |
| Video Headphones        | `Video-Headphones.svg`        | Headphones / audio device — listen mode                  |
| Video Pause             | `Video-Pause.svg`             | Two vertical bars — pause media playback                 |
| Video Play              | `Video-Play.svg`              | Solid triangle — play media                              |
| Video Volume Mute       | `Video-Volume_Mute.svg`       | Speaker with X — muted / volume off                      |
| Video Volume Unmute     | `Video-Volume_Unmute.svg`     | Speaker with sound waves — volume on                     |
| View Filled             | `View-Filled.svg`             | Eye — filled/solid visibility                            |
| View Hide Outline       | `View-Hide_Outline.svg`       | Eye with slash — hidden / password concealed             |
| View Outline            | `View-View_Outline.svg`       | Eye — outlined visibility                                |
| Watch Clock Outline     | `Watch-Clock_Outline.svg`     | Clock face with hands — outlined style                   |
| Watch Clock Solid       | `Watch-Clock_Solid.svg`       | Clock face with hands — solid/filled style               |
| Watch Timer             | `Watch-Timer.svg`             | Stopwatch / countdown timer                              |
| Win                     | `Win.svg`                     | Trophy cup — win / achievement / leaderboard             |
